display.purpose: Page titles and the single hero statement per surface. Neo-grotesque, tracking floor -0.04em.

label.purpose: Functional micro-labels: stat keys, table headers, metadata. Never a decorative eyebrow.

data.purpose: Every number: odds, prices, percentiles, gap points, conditionIds, tx hashes. IBM Plex Mono, tabular figures.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: The only resting-state-free shadow: dropdowns, popovers, the Enter sheet, modals, tooltips, toasts. Resting cards never use it.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus-visible on interactive elements: amber ring offset by the page color.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Content reveals (panel open, route step). Upper bound for product motion.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: Subtle opacity pulse on the live-data dot. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main affordance on a surface that is not the execute moment. Crisp ink fill.

components.name: Enter Button
components.description: The one Committed moment of brand color, reserved for 'Enter basket' (execute).

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary and tertiary actions; ghost on a hairline.

components.name: Bucket Card
components.description: Browse-grid card for one theme bucket. Flat at rest, raises on hover. Shows the two-voice readout and counts.
components.html:
AIFlagship

Belief markets price the AI model race and OpenAI's path to IPO; NVDA is the analyst-banded asset proxy.

● 51%◆ 59th8 pts
2 prediction legs · 1 related security
components.css: .ds-bucket-card{display:block;background:#14171E;border:1px solid #2A2F3A;border-radius:10px;padding:20px;text-decoration:none;transition:background .16s cubic-bezier(.165,.84,.44,1),border-color .16s}.ds-bucket-card:hover{background:#1B1F28;border-color:#3a4150}.ds-bucket-card:focus-visible{outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #0A0C10,0 0 0 4px #E0A33C}.ds-bucket-head{display:flex;align-items:baseline;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px}.ds-bucket-title{font:600 1.125rem/1.3 'IBM Plex Sans',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;color:#F4F6F9}.ds-bucket-status{font:500 0.75rem/1 'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#E0A33C}.ds-bucket-thesis{font:400 0.9375rem/1.55 'IBM Plex Sans',Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;color:#A6AFBE;margin:10px 0 14px;max-width:60ch}.ds-bucket-readout{display:flex;gap:16px;font:500 0.8125rem/1.4 'IBM Plex Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.ds-belief{color:#7AA2F2}.ds-asset{color:#E0A33C}.ds-gap{color:#F4F6F9;margin-left:auto}.ds-bucket-meta{margin-top:12px;font:500 0.75rem/1 'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.04em;color:#737C8A}

components.name: Availability Badge
components.description: Honest tradeability tag on a security. The display-only/gated variant is mandatory on any security not LIVE-UNISWAP.
components.html: ◇ display-only · US-gated ◆ live · uniswap

components.name: Source Pill
components.description: Freshness tag on any value. live (green dot) vs fallback (hollow).
components.html: live ○ fallback

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Theme search on the browse surface. Inset well; amber focus, no glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-search" placeholder="Search a theme — AI, defense, the Fed…" />

components.name: Sentiment Gap Meter
components.description: Signature hero. Two markers on one 0-100 track: azure belief dot and amber asset diamond, with the gap segment and value between. Direction by position + label, never hue alone.
components.html:
8 ptsthe asset runs hotter than belief
◆
●
● belief 51%◆ NVDA 59th pct of analyst band

narrative.overview: Traditional Predictions looks like the screen of a great research desk — graphite, precise, every number sourced — but legible enough that someone who has only ever bought an index fund can read it like a one-page fact sheet. It borrows the gravitas of a Bloomberg terminal and refines it: more whitespace where a newcomer needs to breathe, one confident accent instead of a wall of color, type set with care. The whole product is one relationship: belief markets crossed with the real equities of the same narrative. The palette encodes that literally — amber is the traditional, real-asset side; azure is the belief side; the gap between them is the product.
keyCharacteristics: Dark graphite surface, cool-neutral, never pure black.
Tabular monospace for every number; clean neo-grotesque for every word.
Two-color argument (amber = real asset, azure = belief), graphite for all else.
Flat by default — depth from tonal steps and hairlines, not shadow.
Evidence on the surface: source/freshness tags, on-chain hashes, the analyst band drawn in place.
Legible in five seconds; dense and drill-able one layer down.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: The surface speaks in exactly two saturated voices: amber (real asset) and azure (belief). A third saturated decoration color is deleted. Green and red are state, not voices.

rules.name: The Hue-Plus Rule
rules.body: Belief and asset are never distinguished by color alone — each is also carried by glyph (● belief / ◆ asset), label, and position, so meaning survives colorblindness and grayscale.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Every quantity the user might compare, copy, or verify is set in IBM Plex Mono with tabular figures. Numbers never render in the prose sans.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked text is allowed only as a functional micro-label. It is forbidden as a decorative kicker above section headings.

rules.name: The Flat Terminal Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; depth comes from tonal steps and hairlines. Shadow is a property of floating, and only overlays float.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a soft wide drop shadow on the same resting element. A hairline defines a plane; a shadow lifts an overlay.

dos: Do keep the surface dark graphite (#0A0C10 page, #14171E panels), cool-neutral, never pure black.
Do set every number in IBM Plex Mono with tabular figures so columns align and values are copy/verify-able.
Do restrict saturated color to the two voices — amber (real asset) and azure (belief) — plus green/red for state.
Do carry belief vs. asset with glyph + label + position, not hue alone.
Do show the source and freshness of every value (live / fallback) and a real on-chain tx/hash where one exists.
Do render an honest 'display-only · gated' badge on any tokenized security that isn't tradeable on Uniswap.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; build depth from tonal steps + hairlines.
Do use radii of 4-10px on cards/inputs; pills only for tags.
donts: Don't go crypto-degen: no neon-on-black, no glow/bloom, no casino energy, no hype color.
Don't look like generic AI SaaS: no cream/sand backgrounds, no gradient text, no uppercase eyebrow kicker above every section, no grid of identical icon cards.
Don't look like a sterile legacy bank: no flat gray, no corporate-dead layouts with no point of view.
Don't imply a tokenized security is buyable on Uniswap — they are display-only / US-gated; show the badge, never a one-click 'Buy NVDA.'
Don't ever label the analyst-band percentile an 'implied probability.'
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft drop shadow on a resting element; no resting card shadows.
Don't over-round (no 24px+ radii on cards/inputs), and don't use side-stripe border-left accents.
Don't add gamified-Robinhood confetti, oversized green/red dopamine, or 'investing is a game' flourishes.
Don't animate decoratively; motion conveys state only (150-250ms, ease-out), with a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
